summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that AIZ is currently testing its Daily 200MA support zone near $216.24. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 42.9%. The asset has recently tested this support 4 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $226.64 and a significant trendline confluence around $224.55 (formed by 7 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
